assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The response shows recurring weekend maintenance windows configured in multiple ways - Terraform with 'recurrence = "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA"' and gcloud with '--maintenance-window-recurrence="FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA"' for Saturday maintenance

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The maintenance-setup.sh script shows gcloud commands with '--maintenance-window-start="2024-01-06T02:00:00Z"', '--maintenance-window-end="2024-01-06T06:00:00Z"', and '--maintenance-window-recurrence="FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA"'

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The response includes quarterly exclusions (q1, q2, q3, q4) with approximately 2-week periods each (e.g., March 15 to April 1), which are well within the 30-day limit

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The response includes a 'november-audit-2024' exclusion from '2024-11-01T00:00:00Z' to '2024-11-30T23:59:59Z' covering the entire November audit period

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain that maintenance windows only affect auto-upgrades and that manual upgrades can bypass these restrictions

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GKE release channels (Stable or Extended) or recommend using them for better upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The maintenance-setup.sh script shows gcloud commands with '--add-maintenance-exclusion-name', '--add-maintenance-exclusion-start', '--add-maintenance-exclusion-end', and '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope' for each exclusion

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on Kubernetes versions during extended exclusion periods or the potential security and support implications
